mechanics.excerpt: 1041, using Running Skill in the place of Piloting Skill. BCROUNOE character with the Scrounge Skill has knack for acquir- ing materials that are normally difficult to obtain: This Srili assumes the character has network contacts able to help locate whatever he requires and that he is adept at uncov- erng existing networks establishing new ones wherever he goes.
